Trades We Serve

Every Lead. Your Trade. Your Market.

We built this for the property damage and restoration ecosystem — the trades that feed each other and grow together.

Public Adjuster

Underpaid and denied insurance claims. Homeowners who've already filed and need a fighter.

Learn more →
❄

HVAC

How It Works

Three Steps. Zero Guesswork.

We handle the sourcing, calling, and qualifying. You handle the closing.

1

Tell Us Your Trade & Market

You tell us your niche, city, and monthly capacity. We configure your lead pipeline in 24 hours.

2

We Source, Call, and Qualify

Our team contacts homeowners directly. If they're not ready to spend, they don't reach you. No leads under $2,000 job value.

3

You Close. You Grow.

Leads land in your inbox and phone. You show up, quote the job, win the work. We reload your pipeline every week.

Meet the Founder

Ten Years in the Industry. Built for Contractors.

Frank
Founder

For more than ten years, I’ve worked inside Florida’s property-restoration world — alongside mold remediation crews and water-damage restoration companies — and I’ve seen exactly how the best contractors win, and how good ones get left behind.

The same broken system kept repeating itself: hard-working contractors paying for “leads” that were resold to five competitors, chasing homeowners who were never serious, and grinding their margins to nothing in a race to the bottom. The work was real. The leads weren’t.

I founded Forged Leads to put an end to that. Every homeowner we send you is called, screened, and qualified by a real person before they ever reach you — real damage, real budget, ready to move. One lead. One contractor. No shared lists. No bidding wars. After a decade in this industry, that’s the standard I’d demand for my own business — and it’s the standard we deliver for yours.
